homepage.title: Home | Andrew Cooper MP | Mid Cheshire
homepage.h1: It is the greatest honour to be elected to represent Northwich, Winsford and Middlewich in Parliament. As your MP, I’ll never shy away from the tough challenges. I’ll remain rooted in the community in which I live, and fight for the place we love and feel proud to call home. Together, I know we can build a better society for us all - in Mid Cheshire and beyond.
homepage.meta_description: Andrew Cooper MP, Labour Member of Parliament for Mid Cheshire constituency, Northwich, Winsford and Middlewich.
homepage.text_excerpt: --> Home | Andrew Cooper MP | Mid Cheshire top of page Menu Close Home Latest News Help and Advice Contact Me Surgeries In Parliament It is the greatest honour to be elected to represent Northwich, Winsford and Middlewich in Parliament. As your MP, I’ll never shy away from the tough challenges. I’ll remain rooted in the community in which I live, and fight for the place we love and feel proud to call home. Together, I know we can build a better society for us all - in Mid Cheshire and beyond. All the best, Andrew Latest News Help and Advice Contact Me Surgeries In Parliament 0207 219 7479 andrew.cooper.mp@parliament.uk Unit 23 Meridian House, Road One Industrial Estate, Winsford, CW7 3QG Facebook Twitter TikTok bottom of page

pages.title: Surgeries | Andrew Cooper MP
pages.meta_description: Request an advice surgery appointment by completing the form.
pages.text_excerpt: --> Surgeries | Andrew Cooper MP top of page Menu Close Home Latest News Help and Advice Contact Me Surgeries In Parliament Advice Surgeries My weekly advice surgeries take place on a Friday and alternate between online and in-person appointments . The in-person appointments rotate between venues in Northwich , Middlewich and Winsford . Please note that I and my team are only able to provide advice and assistance to residents of Mid Cheshire constituency. You can check which constituency you live in here . ​ To request an appointment, complete the form below, email Andrew.Cooper.MP@parliament.uk or call the office on 0207 219 7479 . First name * Last name * Email Phone Address What would you like to discuss? * Preferred surgery * Northwich Middlewich Winsford Online Appointment Preferred appointment time * Morning Afternoon Early evening Next 0207 219 7479 andrew.cooper.mp@parliament.uk Unit 23 Meridian House, Road One Industrial Estate, Winsford, CW7 3QG Facebook Twitter TikTok bottom of page

pages.title: In Parliament | Andrew Cooper MP
pages.meta_description: Find about about the work of Andrew Cooper MP in Parliament.
pages.text_excerpt: --> In Parliament | Andrew Cooper MP top of page Menu Close Home Latest News Help and Advice Contact Me Surgeries In Parliament In Parliament Visiting Parliament When Parliament is in session Free tours, run for constituents by Houses of Parliament tour guides, happen on the following days and times while Parliament is sitting: Monday 9am – 12pm Tuesday 9am – 9:50am Tuesday 10:15am – 12pm Wednesday 9am – 9:50am Wednesday 10:15am - 12pm Friday 3:30pm – 5pm Tours take approximately 75 minutes. Please drop me an email at andrew.cooper.mp@parliament.uk for further details. When Parliament is in recess Outside of the session, Parliament offers tours on a commercial basis. For more information, visit the UK parliament website . My work in Parliament You can find out more about my voting record, written contributions, and spoken contributions on the UK Parliament website . Raising issues I regularly raise issues on behalf constituents, businesses and organisations in Mid Cheshire. This can be privately, by writing to the relevant ministers, departments or officials, or in public in the House of Commons chamber. ​ Do you have an issues you would like me to raise? Get in touch . Early day motions I regret that as a point of principle, I do not sign any Early Day Motions except in exceptional circumstances. However, I am happy to discuss ways we can get issues on the national agenda and effect meaningful change. Please get in touch if I can help. 0207 219 7479 andrew.cooper.mp@parliament.uk Unit 23 Meridian House, Road One Industrial Estate, Winsford, CW7 3QG Facebook Twitter TikTok bottom of page
